summary: Tested Be Dental Paradise fullstack (backend + frontend). All 24 backend pytest tests pass covering auth (login/me/refresh/logout, cookies httpOnly set), appointments (public create + admin CRUD + 401 gating + invalid status 422), payments (admin CRUD + auth gating), contact (public submit + admin list), and admin stats. Frontend end-to-end flows all pass: homepage loads with 7 service cards, booking form submits with Calendar + Select (success state shown, appointment appears in admin list), contact form submits, /admin unauth redirect -> /admin/login works, admin login navigates to dashboard (stats/widgets render), appointments page lists rows with search + status dropdown (status-select-{id}) + (delete covered by API tests), payments page creates via dialog + status change + delete all via confirm(), messages page loads, admin-logout-btn logs out and redirects to /admin/login.

issues: Radix Dialog warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent (a11y nit, not functional).

action_items: (Optional a11y polish) Add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) inside Add payment DialogContent to silence Radix warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth cookies: access_token + refresh_token set with httpOnly=True, secure=True, samesite='none' — correct for cross-origin preview over HTTPS.
seed_admin is idempotent and resets password if changed — matches playbook guidance.
bcrypt hash used (verified via login flow) — $2b$ format.

CORS currently set to allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — this is technically spec-invalid (browsers ignore '*' with credentials). It still works here because backend is reached via same origin under the ingress, but consider explicit origin list (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL domain) for correctness.
All Mongo queries project out _id correctly (no ObjectId leakage).
Appointment preferred_date is a plain string (no format validation); consider Pydantic date type for stricter input.
No brute-force lockout / rate limit on /api/auth/login — acceptable for MVP, flag for hardening later.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed appointments/payments/contacts and clean up payments/appointments via DELETE; a couple of TEST_ contact messages remain (contact has no admin delete endpoint by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (session-scoped admin fixture). Key selectors: booking-* (BookingForm), contact-submit-btn (Contact), status-select-{id} (AdminAppointments), payment-status-select-{id} & delete-payment-{id} (AdminPayments use window.confirm), admin-logout-btn (AdminLayout). /admin/payments delete uses window.confirm — in Playwright register page.once('dialog', d.accept). Payments are MOCKED (manual records).
